items.title: Should United Airlines’ IP Flight Tests and NDC Push Require Action From United Airlines Holdings (UAL) Investors?
items.description: Boeing recently announced that it worked with United Airlines to flight-test an Internet Protocol-based data communication system on a United 737-8 ecoDemonstrator Explorer, aiming to streamline information flows between cockpits, air traffic control, and operations centers to improve safety, reduce congestion, and cut fuel use and emissions. United Airlines also entered a long-term collaboration with Travelport to co-develop next-generation NDC retailing tools and booking capabilities for...

items.title: Goldman Sachs Is Bullish On The Boeing Company (BA)
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is among the 12 Best Performing Dow Stocks in 2025. On December 9, 2025, TheFly reported that Goldman Sachs kept a Buy rating and a $257 price target on The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA). This came after Goldman Sachs reviewed the company’s monthly delivery figures. The firm pointed out that The Boeing […]

items.title: Jim Cramer Says “Hexcel’s a Very Good Company”
items.description: Hexcel Corporation (NYSE:HXL) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer expressed thoughts on. During the lightning round, when a caller inquired about the stock, Cramer said: “Hexcel’s a very good company, sir. The only reason I said to buy Boeing is both Hexcel and Howmet had gone up too high. Boeing is still lagging.” Hexcel […]

items.title: Private Markets: Musk’s SpaceX targets 2026 IPO at valuation of $1.5T
items.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is moving ahead with plans for an initial public offering that would seek to raise “significantly more” than $30B at a market value of about $1.5T. Meanwhile, Agentic engineering startup Port raised $100M in a Series C funding round at $800M valuation. items.title: Boeing: 777X Wins Big, Lower 737 MAX Deliveries Are No Surprise
items.description: Boeing posts strong Nov. orders, driven by 777X and 787 demand. BA's operational focus has shifted from cash flow maximization to production quality. See more.
